name: python3-rpm
title: python3-rpm
description:
Python 3 bindings for RPM
The RPM Package Manager (RPM) is a command-line driven package
management system capable of installing, uninstalling, verifying,
querying, and updating computer software packages.
.
This package includes the Python bindings for librpm, allowing Python
scripts to manipulate RPM packages and the RPM database.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-rpm because Python 3 bindings for RPM.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-rpm as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-rpm with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-rpm --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
